query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_sem_dteTermination
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION');

  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_sem_dteTermination
